Toolkit
FRIA Assessment Model Canvas Risk Calculator KPI Generator Agency Risk Map 2026 Tech Trends AuditBench Explorer
Now Available on Android, iPhone & iPad

P.A.L.O. Framework Toolbox

Governance in your pocket. A completely offline, privacy-first companion app for preliminary AI compliance self-assessment against the EU AI Act, ISO 42001, and NIST AI RMF.

Get it on Google Play Download on the App Store

8 Professional Assessment Tools

Version 2.0 brings the complete PALO Framework ecosystem natively to Android, iPhone and iPad.

Risk Tiering & FRIA

Execute EU AI Act Article 27 Fundamental Rights Impact Assessments and instantly classify your AI systems with our interactive 4-tier decision tree wizard.

Interactive Audit Checklists

Track compliance progress locally with persistent audit templates aligned to the AI Act, ISO/IEC 42001, and the NIST AI RMF.

Automated Dossier Export

Autonomously generate professional PDF Conformity Dossiers and Markdown reports directly from your offline assessment data.

Evidence Vault

Store your sensitive compliance data in an encrypted (SQLCipher) local SQLite database, protected by device biometrics with an immutable audit trail.

AuditBench Explorer

Act as an AI investigator with our offline simulator, pre-loaded with prompts and scenarios to uncover 14 hidden non-compliant AI behaviors.

KPI Generator & Canvas

Design measurable Business, Technical, and Ethical KPIs. Map out capabilities visually with the interactive AI Model Canvas.

100% Offline & Privacy-First

P.A.L.O. Framework Toolbox requires ZERO internet permissions. It contains no analytics, no trackers, and no external API calls. Your sensitive compliance assessments and corporate technical documentation never leave your pocket.

DISCLAIMER: This application is an independent educational tool developed by Fabrizio Degni. It is NOT affiliated with, endorsed by, or representative of the European Union, the European Commission, or any government entity. This tool is designed for preliminary self-assessment only and does not provide legal advice or certify compliance. For official regulatory conformity, consult qualified legal counsel and reference the official regulation text.
